context.summary: Proof 033 teacher seasoning lesson P033-FLOW-008 for FLOW.

task: SEASON mechanism lesson into the pond. Mechanism=FLOW. Domain=helpdesk_queue. Observations=tickets originate from users; movement must use the routing board; the approval pinch limits passage; agents see sparse arrivals. Causal chain=Supply appears before a route.; The route must carry the supply forward.; A local limiting point reduces passage.; Upstream accumulation rises while downstream arrival falls.. Consequence signature=arrival rate falls; waiting grows before limiter; far side receives less. Return bounded motifs and lineage only.
